name: Ricotta Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs until light and add 1/2 tsp salt.
2. Gradually add 1 cup powdered sugar, beating continuously.
3. Add 3 tbsp cornstarch and beat until smooth and thick (best done in an electric blender).
4. Squeeze ricotta cheese through a fine sieve into the egg mixture.
5. Combine with softened cream cheese and half & half, mixing thoroughly.
6. Flavor with 1 tbsp brandy or rum, then fold in chopped assorted candied fruit.
7. Pour into prepared pie shell.
8. Cover with second pie pastry and flute.
9. Bake in a preheated oven for 1 hour.
10. Turn off the heat and allow the cake to remain in the oven with the door closed for 3/4 of an hour before serving.
11. Decorate the top with candied fruit and powdered sugar.
